<h2 align="left">Hi 👋! I'm Gump  from 🇧🇷 Brazil</h2>

###

<img align="left" height="100" src="https://i.imgur.com/Z2syxvS.png"  />

###

<h4 align="left">I'm Gump, a programmer known for my passion for technology and everything related to games and software! My journey in programming began at COTIL, Unicamp, where I acquired a solid foundation of knowledge. Currently, I'm pursuing a degree in Game Development at Fatec, honing my skills and striving to bring fun and entertainment to everyone through my projects. In addition to my studies, I'm part of the incredible team of developers at CI&T, where I have the opportunity to put my knowledge into practice and work on challenging and exciting projects.</h4>
